name: Ogden Nightstand Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a touch of vintage style to your bedroom with the Ogden Nightstand from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This brown nightstand with dark brown accents is easy to pair with any existing decor. Designed in a square shape, it has an open shelf and a built-in drawer to keep books, chargers, tissues and other essentials close by your bedside.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
